_generated: 2026-05-29 via inbox-triage-harden workflow (5 corpus angles, 3 adversarial audit lenses)
_purpose: Regression fixture for the inbox agent notify gate. Run scripts/eval_inbox_triage.mjs to score api/agents/inbox.js triageMessage() against these. The gate must NEVER miss an active leak or active lead (false negative); over-notifying on the no-SMS rows is the failure we are guarding against.
_field_notes: correct_notify is the agreed ground truth (SMS fires only when true). correct_category is the agreed category. The emoji-only row uses a placeholder string because raw emoji may not round-trip through the harness.

cases.text: water is coming through my kitchen ceiling RIGHT NOW theres a brown spot getting bigger and dripping into a bowl. raining hard out. what do i do
cases.note: Active interior leak during a storm, water dripping now. Emergency, notify.

cases.text: hey just thinking ahead, our shingles are getting kinda old and curly up by the chimney. nothing leaking. i figure ill probably need a repair sometime in the next year or two, just keeping you guys in mind
cases.note: Explicit future/evaluative interest, no leak, no present ask. Queue, no SMS.

cases.text: boss the tarp on the duncan st job blew off overnight, half the deck is open and its calling for rain this aft. nothing inside the house yet but its gonna get in if we dont get back on it
cases.note: Sub on live job: open deck, rain imminent, imminent intrusion. Time-critical, notify.

cases.text: hi sorry to bug you, you guys did our roof back in march. noticed a tiny drip stain on the spare bedroom ceiling this morning, super small. not actively dripping that i can see. probably nothing but wanted to flag it
cases.note: Existing customer, tiny non-active stain, not dripping. Warranty follow-up, normal, no SMS.

cases.text: is anyone there?? we got water pouring in through the bathroom fan vent during this storm, ceiling is bulging now. we are not customers but you came up first. can someone call asap its 11pm
cases.note: Stranger with active intrusion and bulging ceiling in a storm. Emergency, notify.

cases.text: Good evening. We supply ice & water shield and synthetic underlayment to several roofers in the Moncton area and would love to set up an account with Plus Ultra. Attached is our 2026 pricing. Let me know if you'd like samples.
cases.note: Supplier account pitch. No leak, no buyer. Queue, no SMS.

cases.text: saw a couple shingles in my driveway after that wind last week. roof looks fine from the ground, no leaks or anything inside. do you guys do free inspections? trying to figure out if its worth getting looked at
cases.note: Direct present ask for a free inspection after wind = active lead. Notify even though no leak.

cases.text: yo this is wild lol that drone roof video you posted is sick. how much did that edit cost ya, thinking of doing one for my deck biz
cases.note: Off-topic DM about video editing, no roofing intent. Draft must not promise a referral. No SMS.

cases.text: hey saw a guy say u do metal roofs. lookin to get a steel roof put on my bungalow out in hanwell, asphalts about shot. whats that run me roughly and can someone come measure
cases.note: Clear present intent: steel roof price plus a measure visit. Active lead, notify.

cases.text: Good afternoon. We manage a small commercial plaza in Oromocto with a flat membrane roof that's getting old. Do you handle commercial flat roofs, or only residential? If so we'd want to discuss options. Thanks.
cases.note: Commercial prospect wants to discuss options on a real job now. Active lead, notify.

cases.text: hey its mike from a few months back. you quoted me like 14k for the moncton st place. been shopping around still. can you do any better on price if i book this month
cases.note: Returning price-shopper signaling intent to book this month. Active lead, notify.

cases.text: hi! im a realtor and have a listing on charlotte st going up next week. seller wants a quick pre-listing roof inspection so we can disclose condition. can you get out there in the next few days? whats your fee
cases.note: Realtor pre-listing inspection request with timeframe and fee ask. Active lead, notify.

cases.text: do u guys offer financing? like monthly payments. not ready to do anything yet just wondering what the options are someday
cases.note: Financing curiosity explicitly 'not ready yet... someday'. No present intent. Queue, no SMS.

cases.text: saw your ad on facebook. nice trucks lol. just following the page for now
cases.note: Page follower, no roofing need or intent. Lead-shaped noise. No SMS.

cases.text: how much for a roof
cases.note: Bare direct price request = present buying intent = active lead. MUST notify despite no details. (Candidate prompt wrongly had false; corrected here.)

cases.text: yo we flip houses in the saint john area, might have a few roofs a year for ya down the road. you guys take volume work? no specific job right now just feeling it out
cases.note: Future partnership feeler, 'no specific job right now'. No present intent. Queue, no SMS.

cases.text: hi its dave from 14 morningside, just confirming the crew is still good to start tuesday the 3rd? gotta move my truck out of the driveway the night before
cases.note: Booked customer confirming start date. Logistics, no SMS.

cases.text: good morning! what time roughly does the crew show up on roof day? trying to figure out if i need to be home or if i can leave the gate unlocked for them
cases.note: Booked customer arrival-time logistics. No SMS.

cases.text: Hello, could you please send me a copy of the invoice for the roof you did on our place on Ellerdale last fall? Our insurance is asking for it for our home file. Thanks, Paul
cases.note: Past customer requesting invoice copy. Admin, no SMS.

cases.text: hey question about the roof you guys put on for us 2 yrs ago. noticed a couple shingles look like the tabs are lifting on the back slope. not leaking or anything but is that covered under the warranty? want to get ahead of it before winter
cases.note: Warranty question, explicitly not leaking. No active emergency or buying intent. No SMS.

cases.text: just wanted to say the crew did an amazing job on our new metal roof, cleaned everything up and were so polite. left you guys a 5 star google review!! will be recommending to everyone in quispamsis
cases.note: Thank-you and 5-star review. No action. No SMS.

cases.text: Hi, the roof itself looks great but I'm finding roofing nails and a bunch of shingle bits all over my back lawn and one of my flower beds. My grandkids play out there. Can someone come back and run a magnet over the yard? Pretty disappointed it was left like this.
cases.note: Cleanup complaint on completed job. Frustrating, route as service, not a leak/lead. No SMS.

cases.text: morning mac its ryan crew. heads up the rain last night and we pulled back the tarp on the riverview job and theres water sitting under the felt on the back section, looks like its getting into the deck. holding off till you call
cases.note: Sub on live job: water getting into the deck, crew holding off. Time-critical, notify.

cases.text: hey it was so good seeing the crew finish ours up. while youre still in the neighbourhood my mom across the street on the same row is asking if you could swing by and give her a price on hers too, hers is in rough shape
cases.note: Happy customer referring a neighbour who wants a price now. Active lead, notify.

cases.text: Beacon - your order #BR-44821 for 67 Fairisle is out for delivery today, ETA before noon. 38 bdl Landmark Weathered Wood + 12 rolls synthetic. Reply STOP to opt out.
cases.note: Automated supplier delivery notice. No reply needed, no SMS.

cases.text: hey mac quick q did the etransfer for the cornhill job go thru yet? bank still showing nothing on my end. np if not just lmk
cases.note: Sub asking about pay status. Admin/logistics, no SMS.

cases.text: yo whats the actual address for the tear off tomorrow? the one off rothesay. crew wants to load the truck tonight
cases.note: Crew asking job address for loading. Logistics, no SMS.

cases.text: mac we got a problem at 67 fairisle. opened up the back valley and theres water coming into the bedroom ceiling now, homeowner is freaking out. tarped half of it but rains comin in 2hrs. need a call asap
cases.note: Sub on live job: active interior leak, only half tarped, rain in 2hrs. Emergency, notify.

cases.text: Statement of Account - Plus Ultra Roofing Ltd. Invoice #QXO-2026-7741 in the amount of $4,287.63 is now 14 days past due. Please remit payment to avoid a hold on your account. PO ref: 95 Cornhill drip edge + coil nails.
cases.note: Past-due AP statement. Accounts payable, no SMS.

cases.text: Hi, re: claim #NB-2026-558102 (insured: G. Doucet, 14 Pinewood Cres). I'm the adjuster assigned. Could you send your itemized scope and photos of the wind damage so we can move the file forward? Thanks, Tara Landry, Intact
cases.note: Insurance adjuster document request on existing claim. Admin, no SMS.

cases.text: this is dwayne from maritime metal - your 26ga charcoal coil and the 4 bundles of step flashing are ready for pickup at the moncton counter whenever. closes at 430 today
cases.note: Vendor pickup-ready notice. Routine logistics, no SMS.

cases.text: morning mac. up on the 22 wellington roof and the south plane decking is way spongier than we figured, couple sheets straight up rotten and im not comfortable walking it. holding the crew off till you call. no leak yet just dont want anyone goin thru
cases.note: Sub on live job: rotten/unsafe decking, fall-through risk, crew stopped. Safety hazard, notify even with no water.

cases.text: Hi there, I was looking at plusultraroofing.com and noticed your site isn't ranking on page 1 of Google for "roofing New Brunswick". We help contractors get 30+ exclusive leads/month with guaranteed first-page rankings. Can I send over a free audit? Reply YES and I'll get it to you today.
cases.note: SEO cold pitch. Spam, no reply, no SMS.

cases.text: MACKENZIE - Your business may qualify for up to $250,000 in working capital with NO collateral and same-day approval. Funds can be used for equipment, payroll, or expansion. Rates from 1.9%. Click here to see your pre-approved offer before it expires Friday.
cases.note: Working-capital loan spam. No roofing intent, no reply, no SMS.

cases.text: Your post "Spring roof inspections are filling up fast" reached 1,247 people and got 18 reactions. Boost this post to reach up to 5,000 more people in your area.
cases.note: Automated Facebook reach/boost notification. Not a person. No reply, no SMS.

cases.text: Hi
cases.note: One-word greeting, no intent. Queue, no SMS. Neutral clarifier draft only.

cases.text: (emoji-only reaction)
cases.note: Emoji-only reaction, no content. No reply, no SMS.

cases.text: bonjour, jai une couture qui coule un peu sur mon toit en bardeau depuis la pluie d'hier. pouvez vous venir regarder pis me donner un prix? je suis a Dieppe
cases.note: French homeowner: seam leaking since yesterday's rain plus asks for a visit and a price. Active leak + lead. Notify; reply in French.

cases.text: hey did u pick up the trailer from the marina yet? darryl said it'd be ready by 4
cases.note: No roofing/job anchor (trailer, marina) = likely wrong number = 'other', not 'sub'. Draft must not accept the task. No SMS.

cases.text: we noticed a brown stain spreading on our ceiling in the upstairs bedroom. is that something a roof would cause? not sure if we need someone out or not
cases.note: Spreading stain on an unknown home with tentative visit interest = possible active leak + lead. Lean notify. Contrast with the tiny non-active completed-roof stain which is no-SMS.
